nasb.text: But in their distress they turned to the Lord God of Israel, and they sought Him, and He let them find Him.

esv.text: but when in their distress they turned to the Lord, the God of Israel, and sought him, he was found by them.

cnv.text: 但他們在遭難的時候，回轉歸向耶和華以色列的　神，尋求他，他就給他們尋見。

ccb.text: 然而，他们在患难时归向以色列的上帝耶和华，寻求祂，祂就让他们寻见。
